commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4b5902c920653d1dfe1dd0138b67a46c1dbde674)
commands.review_summary:
The PR modifies `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-runtime-context.ts` to resolve bare `agents.defaults.compaction.model` values through the shared model alias resolver before returning the compaction provider/model.

PR surface: Source +30. Total +30 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main returns a bare compaction override literally, and the linked report provides a sanitized config plus `Unknown model: openai/gpt54mini` log for that path. I did not run a live auto-compaction session in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining work is a narrow compatibility repair plus contributor-side real behavior proof, so it should stay in human review rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(agents): resolve model aliases in compaction model override (fixes #90340)
target.body:
## Summary

Auto-compaction does not resolve configured model aliases before dispatch. When `agents.defaults.compaction.model` is set to an alias like `gpt54mini`, the alias is passed to `resolveModelAsync` as the literal model id, resulting in `Unknown model: openai/gpt54mini`.

**Fix**: Resolve alias-only compaction model overrides through the model alias index (`buildModelAliasIndex` + `resolveModelRefFromString`) before dispatch.

**Changes**: 1 file, +30 lines — `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-runtime-context.ts`

## Root Cause

In `resolveEmbeddedCompactionTarget()`, when the compaction model override (`agents.defaults.compaction.model`) doesn't contain a `/` (i.e., it's a plain alias like `gpt54mini` rather than a fully-qualified `openai/gpt-5.4-mini`), the value was used as-is without alias resolution.

The normal model selection path resolves aliases through `resolveModelRefFromString()` + `buildModelAliasIndex()` (from `model-selection-shared.ts`), which is used by `heartbeat-runner.ts`, `tts-core.ts`, `fallbacks-shared.ts`, and other call sites. The compaction path was missing this resolution step.

**Sibling audit**: All other model ref resolution call sites correctly use `resolveModelRefFromString`. The compaction target resolver was the only call site operating on model aliases without going through the alias index.

**Scope**:
- In scope: Compaction model alias resolution
- Out of scope: Other model resolution paths (already correct), compaction provider routing, fallback model resolution

## Verification

```shell
$ pnpm build && pnpm check
✓ built in 1.97s
[check] all checks passed

$ pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-runtime-context.test.ts src/agents/model-selection.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts
Test Files  3 passed (3)
     Tests  203 passed (203)
```

## Real Behavior Proof

**Behavior or issue addressed**: Compaction model alias (e.g. `gpt54mini` → `openai/gpt-5.4-mini`) is now resolved through the model alias index before dispatch, matching the behavior of normal model selection.

**Real environment tested**: Ubuntu 24.04, Node.js v22.22.0, OpenClaw main @ 66b91d78fe, pnpm 11.2.2

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
```shell
cd ~/openclawProject1
pnpm build
pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-runtime-context.test.ts src/agents/model-selection.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts
```

**Evidence after fix**:
- Source-level: `resolveModelRefFromString` is called with the alias index built from config. When `gpt54mini` matches the alias `openai/gpt-5.4-mini`, the resolved ref `{ provider: "openai", model: "gpt-5.4-mini" }` is returned to the compaction dispatch path.
- Test evidence: 3 test files, 203 tests pass, including the existing `compaction-runtime-context.test.ts` suite covering model-only format overrides, provider/model format overrides, auth profile handling, and Codex runtime routing.
- Terminal output:
```
✓ built in 1.97s
[check] all checks passed (1 non-blocking: npm shrinkwrap stale)
Test Files  3 passed (3)
     Tests  203 passed (203)
```

**Observed result after fix**: All tests green. `resolveEmbeddedCompactionTarget` now resolves aliases through the model alias index, converting `gpt54mini` → `{ provider: "openai", model: "gpt-5.4-mini" }` when the alias is configured under `agents.defaults.models`.

**What was not tested**: End-to-end auto-compaction with a real gateway session using an aliased compaction model. The alias resolution path is covered by existing `model-selection.test.ts` tests; the compaction target resolution is covered by `compaction-runtime-context.test.ts` tests.

## Review Findings Addressed

N/A — no automated review findings at this stage.

## Regression Test Plan

- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-runtime-context.test.ts` — covers compaction target resolution including model-only overrides, provider/model overrides, auth profile handling, and runtime routing
- `src/agents/model-selection.test.ts` — covers alias index building and model ref resolution
- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts` — covers compaction lifecycle hooks

## Merge Risk

**Low**. The change is additive — it adds an alias resolution step before the existing fallthrough. If the alias index is empty or the override doesn't match any alias, `resolveModelRefFromString` returns `null` and the original behavior is preserved unchanged. All 203 existing tests pass without modification.
target.author: zenglingbiao

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
